description: Zep is a context engineering and agent memory platform that stores user, thread, and business context in temporal knowledge graphs for AI applications. It also publishes Graphiti, an open-source framework for building temporal knowledge graphs.
summary: Zep exposes a REST HTTP API at https://api.getzep.com, a zepctl admin CLI, a public documentation MCP server at https://docs-mcp.getzep.com/mcp, an enterprise Memory MCP server with per-project endpoints, and Graphiti MCP server docs for its open-source framework.
